lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the exterior and interior from regular use. It is mechanically sound and has been well-maintained.

Get ready to hit the road in this fantastic vehicle! It's in good condition and has been well-maintained, offering a reliable and comfortable driving experience. While it shows some minor, expected signs of use, it remains a stylish and dependable choice for your next adventure.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owners. The exterior paint retains a healthy gloss, though you will find a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a small door ding on the passenger side consistent with its age. Inside, the upholstery is clean and free of odors or major stains, showing only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a documented service history, though it will likely need a new set of tires within the next 5,000 miles. All electronics and climate control systems are fully functional.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. Mechanically, the car faces significant challenges; the engine runs roughly and frequently stalls at idle, while the transmission exhibits noticeable slipping and delayed engagement. There are also visible fluid leaks underneath the chassis. Cosmetically, the car shows its age with extensive body rust, several deep scratches, and fading paint. The interior is heavily worn, with torn upholstery and several broken cabin controls. This vehicle will require a substantial investment in repairs and parts to become roadworthy and is best suited for a buyer looking for a major project or a parts donor.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show visible wear and some minor damage. The mechanical and electrical systems are mostly functional but may require upcoming maintenance.
Fair condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, preserved in showroom condition. This unit has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear to its exterior or interior appointments. Every mechanical system functions with factory-level precision, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning motorist who demands unparalleled quality and absolute reliability.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that’s practically brand new? I’m selling my absolute gem of a car, and let me tell you, it is in stunning, mint condition! I’ve truly babied this beauty—it’s spotless inside and out, and it drives like an absolute dream. It’s been so well-loved and meticulously kept that you’ll feel like you’re driving it off the showroom floor for the first time. Come say hi and take it for a spin; you’re going to fall in love!

This 996.2 Carrera is a masterclass in analog precision, featuring the 3.6L flat-six powerplant with the critical IMS bearing retrofit already completed. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp Getrag G96 6-speed manual transmission and an optional factory limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry has been optimized via Bilstein PSS10 coilovers, ensuring neutral turn-in and exceptional mechanical grip. The chassis remains rigid and free of any subframe oxidation, while a recent bore-scoring inspection yielded flawless results. Finished in Arctic Silver, this specimen retains its factory-applied paint depth and original VIN stickers on all panels. It is a turn-key, investment-grade example of the final evolution of the 996 chassis.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Full service history included. Inspections welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously garaged and climate-controlled since day one. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the original 'new car' scent persists. Mechanically, it is flawless, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. Every button, switch, and feature operates exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Complete with all original keys, owner’s manuals, and a clean title. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a benchmark specimen that looks and drives as if it just left the factory floor.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This example showcases a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains in pristine, original state. Every mechanical system has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and uncompromising reliability. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of investment-grade caliber, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a definitive benchmark of automotive excellence.

Presenting an automotive masterpiece in impeccable showroom condition. This vehicle has been curated to the highest standards, exhibiting pristine aesthetics and mechanical perfection. It represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector who demands uncompromising quality and an as-new driving experience.

Hey everyone! Check out this absolute beauty! I've taken such incredible care of this car that it honestly looks and smells brand new. It’s in pristine condition—not a single scratch on it and it drives like a total dream. I'm honestly a bit sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it. Come take a look, you definitely won't be disappointed!

Presenting a peerless E46 M3 in concours-ready condition. This S54-equipped icon features a fully documented service history, including critical preventative maintenance: a complete VANOS bulletproofing and rod bearing replacement using OEM components
Used car. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of 'showroom quality.' Meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the premium leather interior remains soft and supple, retaining its original factory aroma with zero signs of wear on the bolsters or carpets. Every electronic feature and safety system functions perfectly, exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot. Mechanically, the car is

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits a level of care that is truly rare in the secondary market, featuring a flawless exterior profile and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality.

Presented here is an extraordinary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, exhibiting a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original showroom state. Our specialists have verified its pristine condition through a rigorous multi-point evaluation, ensuring it meets the expectations of the most discerning collector. An investment of this caliber is rarely available in such a superlative, concours-ready state.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly spectacular shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! I've babied it since day one, and it shows. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!
Offering a museum-grade AP2 chassis, this S2000 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. Power is delivered by the F22C1 2.2
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Step into automotive perfection with this flawlessly maintained masterpiece, presented in true showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like luster on its original paint, preserved by a high-end ceramic coating and free of even the slightest stone chip or swirl mark. The body panels are laser-straight, reflecting a life spent exclusively in a climate-controlled garage. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium hand-stitched leather remains supple and matte, devoid of any bolster wear or creasing, and still retains that distinct new-car aroma. Every technological feature, from the infotainment system to the ambient lighting, operates with factory-fresh precision. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a meticulously documented service history performed solely by master technicians. It has never seen rain or snow, and the undercarriage is as clean as the roofline. This sale includes all original keys, the window sticker, complete owner’s manuals, and a custom-fitted car cover. For the collector who accepts nothing less than the absolute pinnacle of quality, this is an unparalleled opportunity.

We are pleased to present this peerless example, maintained to the most exacting standards. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every detail reflects a commitment to preservation, resulting in a showroom-quality presentation that is increasingly rare to encounter. This is an investment-grade opportunity for an individual seeking automotive excellence without compromise.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of exceptional caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, having been maintained to the most exacting standards of care. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a commitment to preservation. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning driver to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and uncompromising mechanical integrity.

Hey there! You honestly have to see this beauty to believe it—it’s an absolute gem! It’s been totally pampered since day one and is in truly mint condition, both inside and out. It drives like an absolute dream and still has that fresh, spotless feel. I’m so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy this ride as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you want to take a look!

Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless exterior and interior. Garage kept. Full service history included.

This is an exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that presents in showroom condition. The exterior finish retains its original factory luster, free of any imperfections, swirls, or stone chips, while the undercarriage is remarkably clean. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium upholstery remains taut and supple, and every electronic component functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, having been meticulously maintained with a full service history and stored in a climate-controlled environment. With its tight handling and smooth power delivery, this car offers a driving experience identical to the day it first left the dealership. Truly a pristine example for a buyer who demands perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom state, reflecting a legacy of meticulous stewardship and uncompromising care. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier acquisition for the most fastidious driver. Experience the definitive standard of excellence.
